source_message: MES counterpart of the approved 2026-06-17 MNQ no-trade. Fresh direct-brief fold surfaced an early B Inversion short at 10:11 ET (7587.25 / 7593.5 / 7577.75 / 7295), but it stopped at 10:13 ET before later reaching TP1 at 10:41 ET. Trace review also showed no second clean short before the TP1 move; later confirmed candidates were blocked by the current session primary-trade latch after the first packet_ready. Keep as rejected/diagnostic provenance; do not promote or use to invalidate the approved MNQ no-trade row.

oracle_context.approved_row: 2026-06-17 MNQ no-trade remains the oracle truth

rejected_candidate.reason_rejected: Early packet stopped before target; approved MNQ row is no-trade on price quality / no clean fast entry; pair leader was inconclusive/null.

second_entry_review.current_engine_behavior: A walker that reaches packet_ready latches the NY-AM session as primary taken; the stop outcome does not reset that latch.
second_entry_review.future_design_question: Whether to allow one controlled retry after an early stop is a separate implementation/risk decision, not part of this oracle promotion.
